title: Centres of Excellence for Regulatory Science and Innovation (CERSIs)
body: "CERSIs aim to drive the development of safer and more effective medicines and medical products and ensure timely access for patients.  By establishing a network of centres, launched in early 2025, CERSIs represent a landmark initiative in regulatory science. CERSIs foster collaboration between academia, industry and regulators to accelerate the delivery of safe innovation in human health. "
